{"query":"Novo Nordisk Q1 2026 earnings Wegovy oral launch US sales debut quarter injectable Wegovy sales constant currency SEC press release","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1829,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"Novo said first-quarter sales jumped 32% on a constant currency basis to reach 96.8 billion Danish kroner ($15.2 billion), while operating profit surged 65% to 59.6 billion kroner on a reported basis. On an adjusted basis, sales however, fell 4% while profits fell 6%.May 6, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/06/wegovy-glp1-weight-loss-novo-nordisk-earnings-stock-nvo-ozempic.html#:~:text=about%202.3%25%20higher.-,Novo%20said%20first%2Dquarter%20sales%20jumped%2032%25%20on%20a%20constant,%25%20while%20profits%20fell%206%25.","title":"Novo Nordisk (NVO) Q1 2026 earnings: Wegovy sales jump","content":"Novo said first-quarter sales jumped 32% on a constant currency basis to reach 96.8 billion Danish kroner ($15.2 billion), while operating profit surged 65% to 59.6 billion kroner on a reported basis.
On an adjusted basis, sales however, fell 4% while profits fell 6%.
Adjusted figures exclude a $4.2 billion non-recurring impact from a provision reversal related to the 340B Drug Pricing Program in the U.S., Novo said.
Sales of the pill amounted to 2.26 billion kroner, well above analyst estimates compiled by Reuters of 1.16 billion kroner.
In its earnings release on Wednesday, Novo said the Wegovy pill saw around 1.3 million prescriptions in the first three months of the year.
Sales of its injectable Wegovy drug jumped 12% year-on-year to 18.2 billion kronor, falling slightly short of expectations compiled by LSEG.
"The strong Wegovy performance, combined with continued growth in International Operations, has led us to raise our 2026 guidance for both adjusted sales and adjusted operating profit," Doustdar said in a statement alongside the results.
But, in a note following the publication of Novo's earnings update, equity analysts at Jefferies said Novo's change in guidance was unlikely to have a positive impact on consensus forecasts — noting market expectations could even contract in response."},{"url":"https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/353278/000035327826000018/caq12026.htm","title":"Document","content":"Novo Nordisk's adjusted operating profit reached DKK 32,858 million in Q1 2026
Q1 2026 adjusted Obesity care sales increased by 22% at CER.
| CER: Constant exchange rates; 1Excl.
On 6 May 2026 at 13.00 CEST, corresponding to 07.00 am EST, an earnings call will be held.
US Operations reported sales in Q1 2026 increased by 40% measured in Danish kroner and by 51% at CER, also driven by the reversal of the 340B provision.
Throughout 2026, more than 20 launches of Ozempic® 2.0 mg are planned.
Similar to reported sales, reported operating profit in Q1 2026 is also positively impacted by the reversal of sales rebate provisions of USD 4.2 billion (DKK 26.8 billion) related to the 340B Drug Pricing Program in the US.
Net profit increased by 67.2% to DKK 48,557 million and diluted earnings per share increased by 67.1% to DKK 10.91.
Over the last 12 months, patients reached with obesity products increased significantly by 58%, driven by Wegovy® injectable and Wegovy® pill."},{"url":"https://www.pharmaceutical-technology.com/news/novos-ceo-champions-record-breaking-start-for-wegovy-pill-in-us-market/","title":"Novo’s CEO champions “record-breaking start” for Wegovy pill in US market - Pharmaceutical Technology","content":"May 8, 2026 — Total prescriptions for Q1 2026 hit 1.3 million, ($360m) in quarterly revenue for oral Wegovy, The company's net sales rose 32% at constant ...
In its Q1 results, Novo touted a strong early showing for the oral glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1RA), which hit US markets in January 2026.
Total prescriptions for Q1 2026 hit 1.3 million, with that figure rising to more than two million since launch.
Those numbers translate to DKr2.3bn ($360m) in quarterly revenue for oral Wegovy, further cementing the medicine’s robust early-market performance.
Eli Lilly – the unnamed competitor – entered the US market with the launch of its GLP-1RA pill Foundayo (orforglipron) in April 2026.
The Danish drugmaker now expects adjusted sales growth to shrink between 4% and 12% on a currency-adjusted basis, an improvement on the previously projected decline of between 5% and 13%."},{"url":"https://www.novonordisk.com/content/dam/nncorp/global/en/investors/pdfs/financial-results/2026/Q1-2026-investor-presentation.pdf","title":"Q1-2026-investor-presentation.pdf","content":"May 6, 2026 — for first quarter 2026. tavily.raw: {"query":"Novo Nordisk Q1 2026 earnings Wegovy oral launch US sales debut quarter injectable Wegovy sales constant currency SEC press release","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://manufacturingchemist.com/novo-nordisk-2026-guidance-wegovy-pill-q1-earnings","title":"Novo Nordisk raises 2026 guidance after Wegovy pill drives stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings","content":"The firm has reported first-quarter earnings of $7.61bn and revenue of $15.17bn, both ahead of Wall Street forecasts, driven by robust GLP-1 sales and stronger-than-expected performance from its oral Wegovy pill. The stronger-than-expected performance, driven by **robust GLP-1 product sale**s, has led the company to raise its sales and operating profit forecasts for 2026. The **Wegovy** **pill**, launched in January, performed better than expected in the first three months of the year, propelling prescriptions and sales well ahead of analysts' forecasts. \"The strong Wegovy performance, combined with continued growth in International Operations, has led us to raise our 2026 guidance for both adjusted sales and adjusted operating profit,\" Chief Executive **Mike** **Doustdar** said in a statement. Novo also announced during the earnings call that it aims to launch the Wegovy pill outside the US in the second half of 2026, with sales of the pill growing by double digits despite competition from rival **Eli Lilly's** obesity pill **Foundayo**, launched in the US in April.","score":0.85995835,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://qz.com/novo-nordisk-q1-2026-earnings-wegovy-pill-guidance-050626","title":"Novo Nordisk Q1 2026 earnings beat on Wegovy pill demand","content":"# Novo Nordisk beats earnings expectations and the stock surges on demand for weight loss pill. ## First-quarter sales of the oral Wegovy pill hit $353 million, more than double analyst expectations, as the company lifted its full-year outlook. Novo Nordisk raised its full-year guidance on Wednesday after first-quarter sales of its Wegovy weight loss pill came in well ahead of expectations, sending the Danish drugmaker's stock up about 7% in Copenhagen trading. During the first quarter, the pill — which entered the U.S. market in January — tallied roughly 1.3 million prescriptions and brought in 2.26 billion Danish kroner ($353.6 million) in revenue, the company said. Cumulative prescriptions since the pill's launch have surpassed 2 million, Novo Nordisk said, calling it the strongest-ever GLP-1 volume launch in the U.S. Reported first-quarter net sales reached 96.82 billion kroner, a 24% increase, and operating profit came to 59.62 billion kroner, up 54%.","score":0.85509074,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/06/wegovy-glp1-weight-loss-novo-nordisk-earnings-stock-nvo-ozempic.html","title":"Novo Nordisk (NVO) Q1 2026 earnings: Wegovy sales jump","content":"* Novo hiked its 2026 full-year guidance on the back of increased expectations for GLP-1 product sales, saying it now expects adjusted sales and profit to contract between 4% and 12%. * Novo's Wegovy brand now has 65% of all new prescriptions in the U.S., CEO Mike Doustdar told CNBC, calling it a \"turnaround situation.\". Novo Nordisk hiked its annual profit guidance on Wednesday, as the drugmaker said its Wegovy weight-loss pill performed better than expected in the first three months of the year, sending its shares higher. Novo hiked its 2026 full-year guidance on the back of increased expectations for GLP-1 product sales, saying it now expects adjusted sales and profit to contract between 4% and 12% on a currency-adjusted basis, an improvement on the previously projected decline of between 5% and 13%. The quarter was the first period covering sales of Novo's oral weight loss drug, the Wegovy pill, in the U.S. Sales of the pill amounted to 2.26 billion kroner, well above analyst estimates compiled by Reuters of 1.16 billion kroner.","score":0.84183896,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.biopharmaboardroom.com/company-results/64/4678/-novo-nordisk-raises-2026-outlook-as-wegovy-pill-delivers-record-glp-1-launch-performance.html","title":"Novo Nordisk Raises 2026 Outlook as Wegovy® Pill Delivers Record GLP-1 Launch Performance","content":"* Q1 2026 reported sales increased by 32% at CER, positively impacted by a provision reversal related to the 340B Drug Pricing Program in the US. * Q1 2026 adjusted sales, excluding the 340B provision reversal, decreased by 4% at CER, driven by lower realised prices, partly offset by GLP-1 volume growth across geographies. Q1 2026 adjusted Obesity care sales increased by 22% at CER. * US Operations adjusted sales decreased by 11% at CER in Q1 2026, driven by lower realised prices, partly offset by volume growth across the Wegovy® product portfolio. * International Operations sales increased by 6% at CER in Q1 2026, driven by higher volumes. * Q1 2026 adjusted operating profit decreased by 6% at CER, while reported operating profit increased by 65% at CER, driven by a provision reversal related to the 340B Drug Pricing Program in the US. * Adjusted sales growth for 2026, which excludes the 340B provision reversal, is now expected to be -4 to -12% at CER.","score":0.8399576,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.pharmaceutical-technology.com/news/novos-ceo-champions-record-breaking-start-for-wegovy-pill-in-us-market","title":"Novo's CEO champions “record-breaking start” for Wegovy ...","content":"Total prescriptions for Q1 2026 hit 1.3 million, ($360m) in quarterly revenue for oral Wegovy, The company's net sales rose 32% at constant","score":0.8190992,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.59,"request_id":"cb620974-b085-4476-b83f-37572fc2d121"}
